public static interface

PowerManager.OnPowerChangedListener

com.autolink.manager.power.PowerManager.OnPowerChangedListener
Known Indirect Subclasses
PowerManager.PowerChangedListener
PowerManager.PowerChangedListener  

Summary

Public Methods
abstract void onBrightnessChanged(int displayId, int level)
亮度变化回调
abstract void onBrightnessModeChanged(int displayId, int mode)
亮度模式改变的回调
abstract void onDisplayPowerStateChanged(int displayId, int status)
屏幕亮灭改变的回调
abstract void onScreensaverChanged(boolean isEnter)
屏保状态的改变
abstract void onThemeModeChanged(int displayId, int mode, int realMode)
主题改变回调

Public Methods

public abstract void onBrightnessChanged (int displayId, int level)

亮度变化回调

Parameters
displayId int: 屏幕的ID(DISPLAYID_TYPE)
level int

public abstract void onBrightnessModeChanged (int displayId, int mode)

亮度模式改变的回调

Parameters
displayId int: 屏幕的ID(DISPLAYID_TYPE)
mode int: 亮度模式(自动和手动)

public abstract void onDisplayPowerStateChanged (int displayId, int status)

屏幕亮灭改变的回调

Parameters
displayId int: 屏幕的ID(DISPLAYID_TYPE)
status int: 亮和灭

public abstract void onScreensaverChanged (boolean isEnter)

屏保状态的改变

Parameters
isEnter boolean: 退出和进入屏保

public abstract void onThemeModeChanged (int displayId, int mode, int realMode)

主题改变回调

Parameters
displayId int: 屏幕的ID(DISPLAYID_TYPE)
mode int: 主题(THEME_MODE_AUTO、THEME_MODE_DAY、THEME_MODE_NIGHT)
realMode int: 真实的主题(白天和黑夜)
